markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review performance, demo new tools, and align on content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/_DHPGuouviTc1GzSMGtGzz7zRu9sXRrj?tab=summary&timestamp=118.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Looker Dashboard:** GrowthX now has a Looker dashboard, enabling direct GA4/GSC data access for performance analysis. Initial organic traffic shows strong engagement (\~92% for LLM-referred sessions).](https://fathom.video/share/_DHPGuouviTc1GzSMGtGzz7zRu9sXRrj?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
  - [**AI Visibility Tool:** GrowthX demoed a new tool for competitive AI prompt tracking, offering a library of 100k+ historical prompts for immediate insights.](https://fathom.video/share/_DHPGuouviTc1GzSMGtGzz7zRu9sXRrj?tab=summary&timestamp=703.0)
  - [**Content Optimization:** Approved adding short FAQs to articles to improve LLM visibility. Infographics will be replaced with tables or simple illustrations to support upcoming localization.](https://fathom.video/share/_DHPGuouviTc1GzSMGtGzz7zRu9sXRrj?tab=summary&timestamp=1108.0)
  - [**Strategy & Renewal:** A strategy meeting is set for mid-February to align on KPIs for the April renewal. Justin will schedule with key stakeholders (Jen, Krista).](https://fathom.video/share/_DHPGuouviTc1GzSMGtGzz7zRu9sXRrj?tab=summary&timestamp=916.0)

## Topics

### Performance & Analytics

  - [GrowthX now has a Looker dashboard, providing direct access to GA4 and GSC data.](https://fathom.video/share/_DHPGuouviTc1GzSMGtGzz7zRu9sXRrj?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
      - [**Access:** Justin and Jay requested access; Krista will also be added.](https://fathom.video/share/_DHPGuouviTc1GzSMGtGzz7zRu9sXRrj?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
  - [Initial organic performance (since Nov 14):](https://fathom.video/share/_DHPGuouviTc1GzSMGtGzz7zRu9sXRrj?tab=summary&timestamp=228.0)
      - [**Overall:** Strong growth in sessions and engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/_DHPGuouviTc1GzSMGtGzz7zRu9sXRrj?tab=summary&timestamp=228.0)
      - [**LLM Referrals:** High engagement rate (\~92%) from ChatGPT traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/_DHPGuouviTc1GzSMGtGzz7zRu9sXRrj?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)
          - [**Action:** Justin will check on the status of the "click into a demo" conversion event, which is still pending development.](https://fathom.video/share/_DHPGuouviTc1GzSMGtGzz7zRu9sXRrj?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
      - [**Content Pillars:** The "AI Upskilling" pillar drives the most traffic, as expected.](https://fathom.video/share/_DHPGuouviTc1GzSMGtGzz7zRu9sXRrj?tab=summary&timestamp=436.0)

### New AI Visibility Tool

  - [GrowthX demoed a new AI visibility tool for competitive prompt tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/_DHPGuouviTc1GzSMGtGzz7zRu9sXRrj?tab=summary&timestamp=703.0)
  - [**Key Features:**](https://fathom.video/share/_DHPGuouviTc1GzSMGtGzz7zRu9sXRrj?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)
      - [**Historical Prompt Library:** 100k+ prompts (L\&D, education, training) for immediate data, avoiding the months-long data-build time of tools like Profound.](https://fathom.video/share/_DHPGuouviTc1GzSMGtGzz7zRu9sXRrj?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)
      - [**Custom Prompts:** Ability to add specific prompts for tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/_DHPGuouviTc1GzSMGtGzz7zRu9sXRrj?tab=summary&timestamp=870.0)
  - [**Limitation:** The tool currently tracks the entire `udemy.com` domain, not just the `business.udemy.com` subdomain.](https://fathom.video/share/_DHPGuouviTc1GzSMGtGzz7zRu9sXRrj?tab=summary&timestamp=753.0)
      - [**Action:** Katya will investigate if filtering by subdomain is possible.](https://fathom.video/share/_DHPGuouviTc1GzSMGtGzz7zRu9sXRrj?tab=summary&timestamp=753.0)

### Content Strategy & Optimization

  - [**FAQs for LLM Visibility:** Approved adding short FAQ sections (3–5 questions) to the bottom of articles to improve AI visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/_DHPGuouviTc1GzSMGtGzz7zRu9sXRrj?tab=summary&timestamp=1108.0)
      - [**Format:** H2 header for "FAQ," H3s for questions, 20–50 word answers.](https://fathom.video/share/_DHPGuouviTc1GzSMGtGzz7zRu9sXRrj?tab=summary&timestamp=1145.0)
  - [**Infographics & Localization:**](https://fathom.video/share/_DHPGuouviTc1GzSMGtGzz7zRu9sXRrj?tab=summary&timestamp=1167.0)
      - [**Problem:** Udemy is launching content in 4–5 new languages, making text-heavy infographics difficult to localize.](https://fathom.video/share/_DHPGuouviTc1GzSMGtGzz7zRu9sXRrj?tab=summary&timestamp=1210.0)
      - [**Solution:** Replace with tables or simple, text-free illustrations. Katya will confirm localization capabilities for infographics.](https://fathom.video/share/_DHPGuouviTc1GzSMGtGzz7zRu9sXRrj?tab=summary&timestamp=1210.0)
  - [**Content Feedback & Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/_DHPGuouviTc1GzSMGtGzz7zRu9sXRrj?tab=summary&timestamp=1342.0)
      - [**Repetition:** Articles from the last few weeks felt repetitive.](https://fathom.video/share/_DHPGuouviTc1GzSMGtGzz7zRu9sXRrj?tab=summary&timestamp=1384.0)
          - [**Action:** Katya will reinforce the need for unique angles with the content team.](https://fathom.video/share/_DHPGuouviTc1GzSMGtGzz7zRu9sXRrj?tab=summary&timestamp=1384.0)
      - [**Internal Links:** Avoid linking to articles more than one week in the future to prevent broken links.](https://fathom.video/share/_DHPGuouviTc1GzSMGtGzz7zRu9sXRrj?tab=summary&timestamp=1478.0)
      - [**H3 Quality:** Expand H3s beyond single sentences to add more value.](https://fathom.video/share/_DHPGuouviTc1GzSMGtGzz7zRu9sXRrj?tab=summary&timestamp=1549.0)
      - [**AI Summaries:** GrowthX is now adding AI summaries to articles to reduce the lift on Udemy's end.](https://fathom.video/share/_DHPGuouviTc1GzSMGtGzz7zRu9sXRrj?tab=summary&timestamp=1356.0)
      - [**Edit Deadline:** Edits submitted by Friday morning will be applied. Otherwise, content is assumed approved for publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/_DHPGuouviTc1GzSMGtGzz7zRu9sXRrj?tab=summary&timestamp=1793.0)

### Future Planning & Renewal

  - [**Strategy Meeting:** A meeting is scheduled for mid-February to align on KPIs for the April renewal.](https://fathom.video/share/_DHPGuouviTc1GzSMGtGzz7zRu9sXRrj?tab=summary&timestamp=916.0)
      - [**Attendees:** Justin, Jay, Katya, Jen (Udemy), Krista (Udemy).](https://fathom.video/share/_DHPGuouviTc1GzSMGtGzz7zRu9sXRrj?tab=summary&timestamp=968.0)
      - [**Action:** Justin will coordinate scheduling.](https://fathom.video/share/_DHPGuouviTc1GzSMGtGzz7zRu9sXRrj?tab=summary&timestamp=997.0)
  - [**Topic Generation:** Justin needs \~80 unique subtopics for the next six months.](https://fathom.video/share/_DHPGuouviTc1GzSMGtGzz7zRu9sXRrj?tab=summary&timestamp=1634.0)
      - [**Action:** Katya will provide a list of subtopic ideas by early next week.](https://fathom.video/share/_DHPGuouviTc1GzSMGtGzz7zRu9sXRrj?tab=summary&timestamp=1634.0)
  - [**Tableau Access:** Justin will follow up on providing GrowthX access to Tableau for lead connection analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/_DHPGuouviTc1GzSMGtGzz7zRu9sXRrj?tab=summary&timestamp=1022.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Katya:**](https://fathom.video/share/_DHPGuouviTc1GzSMGtGzz7zRu9sXRrj?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
      - [Grant Looker access to Justin, Jay, and Krista.](https://fathom.video/share/_DHPGuouviTc1GzSMGtGzz7zRu9sXRrj?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
      - [Investigate subdomain filtering for the AI visibility tool.](https://fathom.video/share/_DHPGuouviTc1GzSMGtGzz7zRu9sXRrj?tab=summary&timestamp=753.0)
      - [Confirm localization capabilities for infographics.](https://fathom.video/share/_DHPGuouviTc1GzSMGtGzz7zRu9sXRrj?tab=summary&timestamp=1210.0)
      - [Provide a list of subtopic ideas by early next week.](https://fathom.video/share/_DHPGuouviTc1GzSMGtGzz7zRu9sXRrj?tab=summary&timestamp=1634.0)
      - [Reinforce feedback on content repetition and internal linking with the GrowthX team.](https://fathom.video/share/_DHPGuouviTc1GzSMGtGzz7zRu9sXRrj?tab=summary&timestamp=1384.0)
  - [**Justin:**](https://fathom.video/share/_DHPGuouviTc1GzSMGtGzz7zRu9sXRrj?tab=summary&timestamp=916.0)
      - [Schedule the mid-February strategy meeting with all attendees.](https://fathom.video/share/_DHPGuouviTc1GzSMGtGzz7zRu9sXRrj?tab=summary&timestamp=916.0)
      - [Check on the development status of the "click into a demo" conversion event.](https://fathom.video/share/_DHPGuouviTc1GzSMGtGzz7zRu9sXRrj?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
      - [Follow up on providing GrowthX access to Tableau.](https://fathom.video/share/_DHPGuouviTc1GzSMGtGzz7zRu9sXRrj?tab=summary&timestamp=1022.0)
